meta.title: Artistic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Peru | Zaltyko - FPG
meta.description: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over FPG-IPD athletes, official categories, levels, National Selectivo and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over FPG-IPD athletes, official categories, competition levels, national selectivos and licenses.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations and licenses on paper takes hours you could spend training. Information gets lost.
painPoints.specific: Renewing FPG licenses, managing selectivos for Nacional, tracking levels by category, coordination with IPD.
